## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do, and why? Focus on the why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking, fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking, adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Related issues

<!-- "Fixes #123" or "Refs #456" -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `poetry run pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `poetry run black --check src test` passes
- [ ] Added tests for the new behaviour, or documented why tests are not
      applicable
- [ ] Manually verified the affected CLI commands

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/` if developer-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or large binaries committed
